'''ngavolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadableness|leadableness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadableness|leadableness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngavolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæveleth|ngæveleth]] || [[word:ngævelej|ngævelej]] || [[word:ngævelesh|ngævelesh]] || [[word:ngævele|ngævele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavovoloth|ngavovoloth]] || [[word:ngavovoloj|ngavovoloj]] || [[word:ngavovolosh|ngavovolosh]] || [[word:ngavovolo|ngavovolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavoloth|ngavoloth]] || [[word:ngavoloj|ngavoloj]] || [[word:ngavolosh|ngavolosh]] || [[word:ngavolo|ngavolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavofloth|ngavofloth]] || [[word:ngavofloj|ngavofloj]] || [[word:ngavoflosh|ngavoflosh]] || [[word:ngavoflof|ngavoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngavolotho|ngavolotho]] || [[word:ngavolojo|ngavolojo]] || [[word:ngavolosho|ngavolosho]] || [[word:ngavoloko|ngavoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngavoloth|ngavoloth]] || [[word:ngavoloj|ngavoloj]] || [[word:ngavolosh|ngavolosh]] || [[word:ngavolo|ngavolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngavolothol|ngavolothol]] || [[word:ngavolojol|ngavolojol]] || [[word:ngavoloshol|ngavoloshol]] || [[word:ngavolokol|ngavolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngavolothotho|ngavolothotho]] || [[word:ngavolojojo|ngavolojojo]] || [[word:ngavoloshosho|ngavoloshosho]] || [[word:ngavoloko|ngavoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngavolothon|ngavolothon]] || [[word:ngavolojon|ngavolojon]] || [[word:ngavoloshon|ngavoloshon]] || [[word:ngavolokon|ngavolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngavolothoro|ngavolothoro]] || [[word:ngavolojoro|ngavolojoro]] || [[word:ngavoloshoro|ngavoloshoro]] || [[word:ngavolokoro|ngavolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
